_comment: Curated problems served verbatim — no generator, no solver. Add your own here: content is KaTeX (use \text{...} for words), solution is the final answer (numeric/fraction compared by value, else substring). Optional source/license attribute adapted openly-licensed material (e.g. OpenStax CC-BY, MIT OCW CC BY-NC-SA).

problems.content: \text{A fair six-sided die is rolled. } P(\text{roll} > 4) = \;? \quad \text{(reduced fraction)}
\text{A bag holds 4 red and 6 green marbles. One is drawn at random. } P(\text{not green}) = \;?
